title: Boho Macrame Door Curtain
excerpt: Transform your doorway with this beautiful bohemian-style macrame curtain.
materials: Wooden dowel or branch (width of doorway)

steps.title: Measure and cut
steps.description: Cut 60-80 cords, each 4 times the length of your desired curtain.

steps.title: Attach to dowel
steps.description: Use lark's head knots to attach all cords evenly across the dowel.

steps.title: Create pattern
steps.description: Alternate between rows of square knots and spiral knots, leaving gaps for the airy look.

steps.title: Add finishing touches
steps.description: Trim the bottom into a V-shape or straight across, then brush out the fringe.

tips: Work in sections to keep the pattern consistent
Hang the dowel at working height before starting
